testcase.name: test_stats_returns_valid_structure
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter148_partner_billing.py:90: in test_stats_returns_valid_structure assert r.status_code == 200, f"Stats endpoint failed: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Stats endpoint failed: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
